ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exchange_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the exchange rate */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  "rate_value" REAL /* Value of the exchange rate (500 LINK to USDT) */,
  "changes" REAL /* Change in the exchange rate */,
  "changes_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in the exchange rate */,
  "currency_from_id" INTEGER /* ID of the base currency */,
  "currency_to_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quote currency */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the rate is reported */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of trades at the given rate */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest rate of the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest rate of the day */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening rate of the day */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing rate of the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency (e.g., USDT) */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code of the currency (e.g., USDT) */,
  "decimals" INTEGER /* Number of decimal places for the currency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used for the currency (e.g., $ for USD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange (e.g., Binance) */,
  "exchange_code" TEXT /* Code of the exchange (e.g., BINANCE) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the exchange */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the exchange (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading account */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the account belongs to */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange the account is connected to */,
  "account_balance" REAL /* Balance of the trading account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trading account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trading account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trading account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_accounts_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_accounts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_history" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account the trade was made from */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "trade_amount" REAL /* Amount of the trade */,
  "currency_from_id" INTEGER /* ID of the base currency for the trade */,
  "currency_to_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quote currency for the trade */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the trade was made */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee charged for the trade */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_history_currency_to_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_to_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_history_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES trading_accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_history_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_history_currency_from_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_from_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the alert belongs to */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange rate the alert is set for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the alert is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES exchange_rates ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rate_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate history entry */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange rate the history entry belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the rate history entry */,
  "rate_value" REAL /* Value of the exchange rate at the timestamp */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of trades at the given rate */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest rate at the given timestamp */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest rate at the given timestamp */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening rate at the given timestamp */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing rate at the given timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_history_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES exchange_rates ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange rate the analytics entry belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the analytics metric (e.g., moving average, RSI) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the analytics metric */,
  "timeframe" TEXT /* Timeframe for the analytics metric (e.g., 1D, 1H) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES exchange_rates ("rate_id")
)
